schema_version.description: Schema generation this snippet was authored against. Always start at 1; advance only when the generator and Worker support the new shape.

supersedes.description: Optional id of an older snippet that this one replaces. The pointed-at snippet must declare a matching superseded_by.

superseded_by.description: Optional id of a newer snippet that replaces this one. The pointed-at snippet must declare a matching supersedes.

id.description: Twelve-digit timestamp matching the filename prefix (YYYYMMDDHHMM).

scenario.description: The situation the tip addresses (one or two sentences).

media_type.description: MIME type of the embedded media. Empty string when no media is attached; supplied together with media_base64.

media_base64.description: Base64-encoded media payload. Empty string when no media is attached; supplied together with media_type.

code_blocks.description: Optional ordered list of code listings rendered on the snippet detail page. Each entry has a short language label and a verbatim code body. The empty array means no listings.

language.description: Short language identifier such as python, bash, yaml, json, xql.

code.description: The listing body, verbatim. ASCII only is recommended; the renderer escapes HTML.

allOf.description: When media_type is empty, media_base64 must also be empty.
When media_type is populated, media_base64 must also be populated.
